  • Uses of PlayerType in edu.bu.labs.rttt.traversal

    Methods in edu.bu.labs.rttt.traversal that return PlayerType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final PlayerType
    Node.getCurrentPlayerType()
    A getter method to get the PlayerType of the current player (the one making a move this turn).
    final PlayerType
    Node.getMyPlayerType()
    A getter method to get the PlayerType of the MAX player.
    PlayerType
    Node.getOppositePlayerType()
    A method to get the PlayerType of the MIN player.

    Constructor
    Description
